name: Ted Lilly
transactions: June 4, 1996:Drafted by theLos Angeles Dodgersin the23rd roundof the 1996 amateur draft. Player signed June 7, 1996.
July 31, 1998:Traded by theLos Angeles DodgerswithJon Tucker(minors),Peter BergeronandWilton Guerreroto theMontreal ExposforHiram Bocachica,Mark GrudzielanekandCarlos Pérez.

March 17, 2000:theMontreal ExpossentTed Lillyto theNew York Yankeesto complete an earlier deal made on December 22, 1999.December 22, 1999: TheMontreal Expossent players to be named later andJake Westbrookto theNew York YankeesforHideki Irabu.

July 5, 2002:Traded as part of a 3-team trade by theNew York YankeeswithJason Arnold(minors) andJohn-Ford Griffinto theOakland Athletics.  TheOakland Athleticssent a player to be named later,Franklyn GermánandCarlos Peñato theDetroit Tigers.  TheDetroit Tigerssent cash to theOakland Athletics.  TheDetroit TigerssentJeff Weaverto theNew York Yankees. TheOakland AthleticssentJeremy Bonderman(August 22, 2002) to theDetroit Tigersto complete the trade.
November 18, 2003:Traded by theOakland Athleticsto theToronto Blue JaysforBobby Kielty.
December 15, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago Cubs.
July 31, 2010:Traded by theChicago CubswithRyan Theriotand cash to theLos Angeles DodgersforKyle Smit(minors),Brett Wallach(minors) andBlake DeWitt.
